Bash(# First check if old JWT still works
JWT=$\(cat /tmp/keptpages_jwt.txt 2>/dev/null\)
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $JWT" http://127.0.0.1:8790/api/user/profile | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('displayName', d.get\('error',''\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

  -H "Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6Imp2dmNiZWt6bXNueml1bHBld3doIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3MjM4NTg0NCwiZXhwIjoyMDg3OTYxODQ0fQ.HPYMOeeHLEMKMz6G5Fg8VWOl0ymqoGVjqFzVjKQr25Y" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
